Weaving Communication,
Design & Development

Rooted in the Latin word texo — “to weave, to build, to construct”.

Welcome to my digital basecamp where I document my craft in accessibility, design and front-end development.

My First Post

July 7, 2025

I'm excited to start a new learning journey as a Scrimba Bootcamp student! After several months of learning in the Frontend Developer Career Path.
